s: In 1989, Greg Hibbard suited up for CHW as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.210, WHIP 1.330, SO 55, WAR 2.200.
In 1990, Greg Hibbard suited up for CHW as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.160, WHIP 1.220, SO 92, WAR 3.500.
In 1991, Greg Hibbard suited up for CHW as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.310, WHIP 1.300, SO 71, WAR 1.000.
In 1992, Greg Hibbard suited up for CHW as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.400, WHIP 1.390, SO 69, WAR 1.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (CHW -> CHC).
In 1993, Greg Hibbard suited up for CHC as a two_way. Key numbers: AVG 0.092, OPS 0.227, HR 0, RBI 3, WAR 1.900. Notable context: Joined CHC.
Changed teams after the previous season (CHC -> SEA).
In 1994, Greg Hibbard suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 6.690, WHIP 1.810, SO 39, WAR 0.600. Notable context: Joined SEA.
